calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Partial Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER MAPLEBEAR, INC. DBA INSTACART's Hearing On Petition To Vacate Partial Final Arbitration Award is Off calendar. Order filed May 9, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Partial Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Continued To May-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BENJAMIN W. BERKOWIZ OF KEKER & VAN NEST LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-773-6689 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. SHANNON LISS-RIORDAN OF THE LICHTEN & LISS-RIORDAN, P.C., TEL. NO. 1-415-630-2651 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; Petitioner Maplebear, Inc.'s petition to vacate partial final arbitration award is continued to May 17, 2017. If the court confirms its tentative ruling that it lacks jurisdiction to address the error if any made by the arbitrator on the clause construction, the court will issue a decision before the May 17, 2017 hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
